title: Scenario
description: Defines an executor and its parameters. Children run under that executor. Multiple scenarios can coexist in one plan and run in parallel.

executor.description: The k6 executor type for this scenario.

vus.description: Number of virtual users (for constant-vus, per-vu-iterations, externally-controlled).

iterations.description: Total number of iterations (for shared-iterations, per-vu-iterations).

target.description: Target VU count or rate at the end of this stage.

time_unit.description: Time unit for arrival rate executors (e.g. '1s', '1m').

pre_allocated_vus.description: Pre-allocated VU pool for arrival-rate executors.

max_vus.description: Maximum VUs allowed (for externally-controlled and arrival-rate executors).

graceful_stop.description: Time to wait for in-flight iterations to finish after the scenario ends.

exec.description: Name of the exported JS function to run (advanced; defaults to 'default').

start_time.description: Delay before this scenario starts (for staggering parallel scenarios).

tags.description: Custom tags applied to all metrics from this scenario.

children.description: Child nodes (samplers, controllers, timers, assertions, data sources).
